topic: Fresh tire tracks lead into my driveway each morning and stop at the garage, with no car.
title: Tire Tracks in My Driveway, But No Car | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Fresh tire tracks led into my driveway each morning and stopped at the garage.
scenes.image_prompt: Wet tire tracks leading up a driveway to a closed garage at dawn, fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There was never a car at the end of them.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty driveway before a closed garage door, gray morning mist, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone and own no vehicle.
scenes.image_prompt: A quiet house with an empty cracked driveway at dawn, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The tracks were warm and the gravel freshly pressed.
scenes.image_prompt: Close view of fresh tire impressions in damp gravel, faint mist, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They ended at a wall, not a door.
scenes.image_prompt: Tire tracks ending at a solid garage wall with no opening, gray fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I raked the driveway smooth and waited up.
scenes.image_prompt: A freshly raked smooth gravel driveway at dusk, low light, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never heard an engine, never saw headlights.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark empty driveway at night with no lights, faint streetlight haze, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But by dawn the tracks were there again, deeper than before.
scenes.image_prompt: Deep fresh tire tracks pressed into raked gravel at dawn, mist, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The garage began to smell of gasoline and rain.
scenes.image_prompt: A dim closed garage interior with faint haze and shadow, single bare bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the tracks led out of the garage, toward my front door.
scenes.image_prompt: Tire tracks leading from a garage across gravel toward a house front door, dawn fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep the garage shut. The tracks come anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: A padlocked garage door with tire tracks ending before it, gray morning, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My neighbor said the last owner drove off one night and never returned.
scenes.image_prompt: An old faded house at twilight with an empty driveway, fog, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing
